ruling_reference: Option 1 — expand rag-index analyzer file coverage (see analysis.json ruling block)
objective: Close the 47-file analyzer-slice coverage gap (215/262 → ≥235/262 AC-09 alignment) via investigation-first then minimal-blast-radius fix inside src/integration/rag/* only. Restores AC-09 ±10% threshold without touching shared analyzer/scanner code or IndexingResult schema.

acceptance_criteria.description: Phase 1 investigation report identifies which of T1 (glob), T2 (analyzer internal filter), T3 (ChunkConverter filter) is the actual gap source. Report committed before any src/ changes.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Phase 1 produces an INVESTIGATION-REPORT.md in the WO directory enumerating per-target findings with concrete probe-script output.

acceptance_criteria.description: Live AC-09 dynamic alignment: chunksSkipped(header_status_missing) ≥ 235 of 262 missing-header files (matches ±10% predecessor threshold).
acceptance_criteria.verification: Run rag-index against coderef-core itself; inspect .coderef/rag-index.json; chunksSkipped ≥ 235.

acceptance_criteria.description: Zero changes outside src/integration/rag/*. Verified by git diff --stat.
acceptance_criteria.verification: git diff --stat <base>..HEAD -- src/ shows ONLY src/integration/rag/* paths.

acceptance_criteria.description: Zero new field on IndexingResult schema. Zero new SkipReason enum values.
acceptance_criteria.verification: grep IndexingResult shape pre/post → identical fields. grep SkipReason enum pre/post → identical values.

acceptance_criteria.description: tsc --noEmit clean on both tsconfig.json and tsconfig.cli.json after each phase commit.
Test fixtures added: at least one type-only file fixture + at least one __tests__/ file fixture in src/integration/rag/__tests__/. Each fixture asserts ≥1 chunk produced post-fix.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Run targeted test file; PASS on both fixtures.

acceptance_criteria.description: Existing chunk-conversion + invariant tests from predecessor WO still PASS (no regressions).
Predecessor WO archive (indexing-orchestrator-path-normalization-fix) is NOT modified. Verified by git diff against its files.
Phase 7 archive (pipeline-indexing-rag) is NOT modified. Verified by git diff.
WO archived under coderef/archived/rag-index-analyzer-slice-coverage/ with ARCHIVED.md including AC table + per-target findings + commit chain + decisions + hard constraints.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Cross-project /close-workorder run by SKILLS produces ARCHIVED.md.

phases.label: Investigation — identify gap source(s)

tasks.description: Re-run baseline: populate.js + rag-index.js against coderef-core. Capture chunksSkipped count (expect 215 pre-fix).

T1: glob check — write a probe that runs the same glob list ['./**/*.ts','./**/*.tsx','./**/*.js','./**/*.jsx','./**/*.py'] from project root; assert membership of all 47 residual filenames (from predecessor archive's diff-skipped.mjs).
tasks.expected_outcome: All 47 files match globs (T1 NOT the gap source). Document in INVESTIGATION-REPORT.md.
tasks.halt_if: Globs miss any of 47 files → T1 IS a partial gap source; document and proceed.

tasks.description: T2: analyzer-internal-filter check — write a probe that calls analyzerService.analyze(...) directly and lists every filename in returned node array. Assert membership of all 47 residual filenames.
tasks.expected_outcome: Likely SOME of 47 are missing from analyzer output (type-only files). Document which ones in INVESTIGATION-REPORT.md.

tasks.description: T3: ChunkConverter-filter check — write a probe that runs ChunkConverter against the analyzer output and lists every filename that produces ≥1 chunk. Compare to T2 output.
tasks.expected_outcome: ChunkConverter may drop additional files (likely __tests__/ patterns). Document in INVESTIGATION-REPORT.md.

tasks.description: Author INVESTIGATION-REPORT.md in WO directory: per-target findings table, root-cause attribution per residual file, recommended fix surface(s).

halt_and_report: If investigation reveals all three targets are insufficient and gap is in shared analyzer/scanner code → close DIVERGED per DR-ANALYZER-SLICE-D, file STUB-ANALYZER-SHARED-EXTRACTOR-COVERAGE-001.

phases.label: Implementation — minimal-blast-radius fix

tasks.description: Apply T2 fix if root cause: adjust analyzer-side handling INSIDE src/integration/rag/* only. If fix requires shared-analyzer change, HALT per DR-ANALYZER-SLICE-B.
Apply T3 fix if root cause: adjust ChunkConverter filter chain. If fix requires widening chunk-eligibility enum, HALT and file stub.
Run tsc --noEmit on both configs after each commit; ensure clean.

halt_and_report: Fix would require change outside src/integration/rag/* → HALT (DR-ANALYZER-SLICE-B)
Fix would require new IndexingResult field → HALT (DR-PHASE-7-B violation)
Fix would require new SkipReason value → HALT (out-of-scope)

phases.label: Tests — fixtures + regression

tasks.description: Add type-only file fixture in src/integration/rag/__tests__/. Assert ChunkConverter produces ≥1 chunk for it post-fix.
Add __tests__/ file fixture in src/integration/rag/__tests__/. Assert ChunkConverter produces ≥1 chunk for it post-fix.
Run full src/integration/rag/__tests__/ suite. Confirm zero regressions on predecessor WO's chunk-conversion + invariant tests.
tasks.verification: Test runner output PASS for all suites

halt_and_report: Any predecessor test regresses → HALT, investigate (likely a shape bug surfaced by widened coverage; this is what we wanted to find but must be fixed before merge)

phases.label: Dynamic re-verify + close

tasks.description: Run populate.js + rag-index.js against coderef-core. Capture chunksSkipped count.
Run git diff --stat <base>..HEAD -- src/ → confirm ONLY src/integration/rag/* paths (AC-03).
Verify predecessor + Phase 7 archives untouched (AC-09 + AC-10).
Author closeout report in WO directory; status → completing in communication.json. Push all atomic commits in single push.
tasks.commit_strategy: atomic commit: close(WO-RAG-INDEX-ANALYZER-SLICE-COVERAGE-001): closeout report + AC table

halt_and_report: AC-02 unreachable inside rag-index local code → close DIVERGED + file STUB-ANALYZER-SHARED-EXTRACTOR-COVERAGE-001

definition_of_done: AC-01..AC-12 all PASS or AC-02 marked DIVERGED with structural rationale + follow-up stub filed
All atomic commits pushed clean to origin/main

execution_rules.atomic_commits: one per phase task per fix target; one push at end of each phase
execution_rules.tsc_invariant: tsc --noEmit clean on both configs after each commit
execution_rules.boundary: src/integration/rag/* ONLY for src/ changes; tests in src/integration/rag/__tests__/ and __tests__/pipeline/ only
execution_rules.halt_protocol: if any halt-and-report point trips, status → halted in communication.json, await ORCHESTRATOR ruling before resuming
